_doc: Players monitored beyond club-name coverage. 'squad' = current EST players on departure watch; 'targets' = reported EST transfer targets. 'name' + 'name_ar' are used as Google News queries; matching also uses 'aliases' (alternate spellings seen in the press). 'note' is injected into the Gemini prompt for namesake disambiguation - keep it short and update it when a player moves.

targets.name: Adel Bettaieb
targets.note: French-born Tunisian forward, free agent (ex-Argeș Pitești) - reported EST target

targets.name: Hazem Mastouri
targets.note: Tunisian international striker at Dynamo Makhachkala (Russia) - reported EST target

targets.name: Lucas Ribeiro
targets.note: Brazilian forward, ex-Mamelodi Sundowns, now Cultural Leonesa (Spain) - reported EST target

targets.name: Samy Chouchane
targets.note: French-born Tunisian midfielder at Dijon FCO - reported EST target

squad.name: Elias Mokwana
squad.note: South African winger owned by EST, on loan at Al-Hazem (Saudi Arabia)

squad.name: Kouceila Boualia
squad.note: Algerian winger at EST, reportedly transfer-listed

squad.name: Ibrahima Keita
squad.note: Mauritanian international right-back at EST, ex-TP Mazembe
